hooks.command: if grep -q 'MEGA-OS:UNCONFIGURED' active/now.md 2>/dev/null; then echo ''; echo '=== WELCOME TO MEGA-OS ==='; echo 'This system has not been configured yet.'; echo 'Run /setup to start guided onboarding (~20 min).'; echo 'Or /setup --minimal for quick setup (~5 min).'; echo '==========================='; echo ''; else cat active/index.json 2>/dev/null; cat active/now.md active/priorities.md active/blockers.md active/risks.md active/improvements.md active/historian-digest.md 2>/dev/null || true; echo ''; if git remote get-url upstream &>/dev/null; then git fetch upstream --quiet 2>/dev/null; LOCAL_VER=$(cat VERSION 2>/dev/null | tr -d '[:space:]'); REMOTE_VER=$(git show upstream/master:VERSION 2>/dev/null | tr -d '[:space:]'); if [ -n "$REMOTE_VER" ] && [ -n "$LOCAL_VER" ] && [ "$LOCAL_VER" != "$REMOTE_VER" ]; then echo "Framework update available (v${REMOTE_VER}). Run /update to pull it."; echo ''; fi; fi; echo 'TRIAGE: Non-trivial requests → classify (quick/focused/multi-step) → TeamCreate for multi-step.'; fi
echo 'SESSION CLOSE: Run the Historian Checklist (5 files) if any decisions, file changes, priority shifts, or milestones occurred. See CLAUDE.md Session Close Protocol.'
